name: @miniclinic/mobile
_greenloop_note: Everything with native code is pinned to the exact SDK 54 set (RN 0.81.5 / React 19.1.0 / screens 4.16 / safe-area 5.6), mirrored by root overrides — expo-router declares screens/safe-area as `*`, and a floating react-native-screens (4.25+) breaks the ExpoHead pod build (yoga headers + renamed RNS classes; found by dogfood runs 7-8). When bumping the SDK, re-pin via `npx expo install --fix` and update the root overrides to match.
